creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237845
lang/cjs - diff for 5.4.1 update

Pursuant with the contributed patch set[1] for x11/cinnamon and deps, albeit considering that this patch set may not be usable on FreeBSD 12.3 or 12.4[2] but here is a patch for updating lang/cjs to release 5.4.1

Observations:
- The original COPYING.LGPL has been merged in effect to the upstream COPYING file. 
- The meson build depends on mozjs78 or greater, so this retains the build dep on mozjs 78


[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267250
[2] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267245#c2
